self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: R5 Frost Burial: Normal/Charged Attack hits have a 100% chance (CD 10s) to drop an Everfrost Icicle dealing AoE DMG equal to 140% of ATK (360% instead against Cryo-affected opponents, not modeled here — using the baseline 140% value); approximated as bonus Normal/Charged Attack DMG.
